hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) && [ "$branch" != 'main' ] && [ "$branch" != 'master' ] || (echo 'BLOCKED: Direct commit to main/master is not allowed. Create a feature branch first.' && exit 1)
echo 'REMINDER: Run linter/formatter on changed Python files before committing.'
echo 'REMINDER: Run linter/formatter on changed TypeScript files before committing.'
